title: Filter Tasks by Status
summary: Users can filter the visible task list to show all tasks, only active (incomplete) tasks, or only completed tasks.

behaviorStatements.text: When a user selects the 'All' filter, the system shall display every task regardless of completion state.
behaviorStatements.response: the system shall display every task regardless of completion state

behaviorStatements.text: When a user selects the 'Active' filter, the system shall display only tasks that are not complete.
behaviorStatements.response: the system shall display only tasks that are not complete

behaviorStatements.text: When a user selects the 'Completed' filter, the system shall display only tasks that are complete.
behaviorStatements.response: the system shall display only tasks that are complete
